'''Talasea's Planetary Governor's Palace''' was the former [[Governor/Legends|governor's]] residence of [[Talasea]]. In [[6 ABY/Legends|6.5]] [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], it became a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] base. Its main room was the [[Grand Room]]. It had an ancient look, being made from plaster and heavy wooden beams.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
